title: BEM-627 contour lint
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

lint_script=scripts/'internal_contour_architecture_lint.py'
lint_source=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'STATE_OUT = Path("governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json")',
'REPORT_OUT = Path("governance/reports/internal_contour_architecture_lint.md")',
'def exists(path):',
'    p = Path(path)',
'    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size > 0',
'def load_json(path):',
'    p = Path(path)',
'    if not p.exists():',
'        return {}',
'    try:',
'        return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'    except:',
'        return {}',
'def check(name, ok, evidence, severity="high", note=""):',
'    return {"name": name, "pass": bool(ok), "evidence": evidence, "severity": severity, "note": note}',
'def main():',
'    checks = []',
'    checks.append(check("role_communication_canon_exists", exists("governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md"), "governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md"))',
'    checks.append(check("role_execution_evidence_canon_exists", exists("governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md"), "governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md"))',
'    checks.append(check("bem605_internal_auditor_package_exists", exists("governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem625_bem605_hourly_report_internal_auditor_review.json"), "governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem625_bem605_hourly_report_internal_auditor_review.json"))',
'    checks.append(check("bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotated", exists("governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json"), "governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json"))',
'    checks.append(check("auditor_to_auditor_mailbox_lane_exists", Path("governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor").exists(), "governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor"))',
'    route = load_json("governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json")',
'    required_route = ["provider_checked", "primary_provider", "reserve_provider", "selected_provider", "reserve_used", "reason"]',
'    for key in required_route:',
'        checks.append(check("provider_route_has_" + key, key in route, "governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json"))',
'    # Old gpt_to_claude mailbox files are allowed only when annotated or when they are auditor-to-auditor. Existing BEM-605 is annotated as historical misroute.',
'    old = Path("governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem605_hourly_report_template_review_request.md")',
'    annotated = exists("governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json")',
'    checks.append(check("historical_bem605_mailbox_misroute_not_unannotated", (not old.exists()) or annotated, str(old), note="Old misroute must be annotated and superseded."))',
'    # Deno must be labeled transport, not internal executor.',
'    role_canon = Path("governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") if Path("governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md").exists() else ""',
'    checks.append(check("deno_labeled_transport_not_executor", "Deno является внешним транспортным адаптером" in role_canon, "governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md"))',
'    failed = [x for x in checks if not x.get("pass")]',
'    status = "pass" if not failed else "failed"',
'    blocker = None if not failed else {"code":"INTERNAL_CONTOUR_ARCHITECTURE_LINT_FAILED", "failed": failed}',
'    result = {"schema_version":"internal_contour_architecture_lint.v1", "status": status, "checks": checks, "blocker": blocker, "created_at":"workflow_runtime"}',
'    STATE_OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    STATE_OUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    REPORT_OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    lines = ["# Internal Contour Architecture Lint", "", "Status: " + status, "", "## Checks"]',
'    for x in checks:',
'        lines.append("- " + x["name"] + ": " + ("PASS" if x.get("pass") else "FAIL") + " | " + x.get("evidence", ""))',
'    lines.append("")',
'    lines.append("## Blocker")',
'    lines.append("null" if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))',
'    REPORT_OUT.write_text(SEP.join(lines) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps({"status": status, "failed": len(failed)}, ensure_ascii=False))',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    main()'
]
lint_script.write_text(sep.join(lint_source)+sep)

workflow=wfs/'internal-contour-architecture-lint.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Internal Contour Architecture Lint

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'
      - 'governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md'
      - 'governance/internal_contour/**'
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/**'
      - 'governance/provider_gates/**'
      - 'scripts/internal_contour_architecture_lint.py'
      - '.github/workflows/internal-contour-architecture-lint.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: internal-contour-architecture-lint
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  lint-internal-contour:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check lint script
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/internal_contour_architecture_lint.py

      - name: Run architecture lint
        run: python3 scripts/internal_contour_architecture_lint.py

      - name: Commit lint result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json governance/reports/internal_contour_architecture_lint.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-627 internal contour architecture lint result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# Produce immediate lint result in this patch without running external workflow.
checks=[]
checks.append({'name':'role_communication_canon_exists','pass':Path('governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md').exists(),'evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'})
checks.append({'name':'role_execution_evidence_canon_exists','pass':Path('governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md').exists(),'evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md'})
checks.append({'name':'bem605_internal_auditor_package_exists','pass':Path('governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem625_bem605_hourly_report_internal_auditor_review.json').exists(),'evidence':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem625_bem605_hourly_report_internal_auditor_review.json'})
checks.append({'name':'bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotated','pass':Path('governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json').exists(),'evidence':'governance/audit_mailbox/meta/bem625_bem605_mailbox_misroute_annotation.json'})
checks.append({'name':'auditor_to_auditor_mailbox_lane_exists','pass':Path('governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor').exists(),'evidence':'governance/audit_mailbox/internal_auditor_to_external_auditor'})
route={}
try: route=json.loads(Path('governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json').read_text(errors='ignore'))
except: route={}
for key in ['provider_checked','primary_provider','reserve_provider','selected_provider','reserve_used','reason']:
    checks.append({'name':'provider_route_has_'+key,'pass':key in route,'evidence':'governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json'})
role_canon_text=Path('governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md').read_text(errors='ignore') if Path('governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md').exists() else ''
checks.append({'name':'deno_labeled_transport_not_executor','pass':'Deno является внешним транспортным адаптером' in role_canon_text,'evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md'})
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'INTERNAL_CONTOUR_ARCHITECTURE_LINT_FAILED','failed':failed}
result={'schema_version':'internal_contour_architecture_lint.v1','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:26 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'internal_contour_architecture_lint.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

protocol=protocols/'INTERNAL_CONTOUR_PREFLIGHT_LINT.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-627 | Internal Contour Preflight Lint'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:26 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Before reporting internal contour PASS, run architecture lint. It verifies role-bus canon, evidence canon, provider route fields, mailbox misuse annotation, and Deno-as-transport labeling.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem627_internal_contour_architecture_lint.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-627 | Internal Contour Architecture Lint | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:26 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem627_internal_contour_architecture_lint','cycle_id':'bem627-internal-contour-architecture-lint','source':'gpt_validator','status':status,'lint_script':str(lint_script),'workflow':str(workflow),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:26 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        contour_state={}
contour_state['bem627_internal_contour_architecture_lint']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'lint_script':str(lint_script),'workflow':str(workflow),'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['internal_contour_architecture_lint']='active_'+status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:26 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem627_internal_contour_architecture_lint.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-627 '+status.upper()+': internal contour architecture lint created and run.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(lint_script),str(workflow),str(state_file),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created and ran internal contour architecture lint to enforce role-bus, provider evidence, mailbox boundaries, and Deno transport labeling')
"""
No issue comments.
